brief.productOrTopic: AI-powered content planner for solo creators
brief.targetAudience: TikTok creators who post 3-5 times per week
keySellingPoints: turns one idea into 10 video angles
creates hooks, scripts and shot lists
constraints: Do not claim guaranteed virality or revenue.

trendInsights.angle: One idea becomes a full content system
trendInsights.audienceTension: Solo creators know they should post consistently but lose time turning ideas into shootable videos.
trendInsights.contentPattern: Open with a blank notes app, reveal a complete board of hooks, script blocks and shot cards.
trendInsights.evidenceNote: Designed around TikTok-first storytelling, trends as templates, and vertical production principles.

trendInsights.angle: Stop asking AI for copy only
trendInsights.audienceTension: Many creators get generic scripts but still do not know what to film.
trendInsights.contentPattern: Compare a plain AI paragraph with a production-ready shot list.
trendInsights.evidenceNote: Highlights the product's core difference: script plus camera direction.

hooks.hookLine: If you still start every TikTok from a blank page, this workflow can save your whole content day.
hooks.visualAction: Creator opens an empty notes app, then taps once to reveal a complete script board.

hooks.hookLine: I turned one basic product idea into 10 TikTok-ready videos.
hooks.visualAction: Fast screen recording of one brief expanding into multiple hooks and shot lists.
hooks.reason: Outcome is specific and visually demonstrable.

selectedHook.hookLine: If you still start every TikTok from a blank page, this workflow can save your whole content day.
selectedHook.visualAction: Creator opens an empty notes app, then taps once to reveal a complete script board.

script.voiceover: If you still start every TikTok from a blank page, this workflow can save your whole content day.
The problem is not having ideas. The problem is turning each idea into a hook, script, shot list and CTA.
GlowByte turns one brief into multiple TikTok-ready creative routes: hooks, voiceover, scene design and captions.
Pick the strongest hook, export the shot list, and send it directly to your editor or film it yourself.
Join the early access waitlist and start with one idea, not an empty page.

shots.visual: Creator opens with direct eye contact and a fast gesture toward the text overlay.
shots.broll: Phone screen, creator desk, sticky notes, timeline, script cards.
shots.caption: Stop starting from zero
shots.productionNote: Keep text within the safe center area and cut every 1-3 seconds.

shots.visual: Highlight the exact output that matches the voiceover: hook list, script block, or shot card.
shots.broll: Cursor moving, generated cards, export button, filming checklist.

captions.title: GlowByte: from idea to shootable TikTok plan
captions.caption: One idea is enough when your workflow turns it into hooks, scripts and shot lists. Join the early access waitlist
captions.pinnedComment: Comment "brief" and I will share the exact structure used to generate this video plan.

compliance.issue: Avoid promising guaranteed virality or revenue outcomes.
compliance.saferRewrite: Use 'designed to help creators test more structured ideas' instead of guaranteed performance claims.

notes: Strongest when the first shot visually demonstrates the promise.
Record 2-3 alternate hooks before filming the full script.

editorNotes: Shoot vertical 9:16 and keep the first visual change within 1 second.
Use captions as meaning, not decoration.
Create at least 3 hook variants before deciding which version to film.
